synopsis: Princess Leia’s stealth squadron is together again, just in time to fight for their lives. The Star Destroyer Devastator launches an all-out attack on the Rebel fleet! Meanwhile, Vader’s secret agent realizes what it could mean to fail the Dark Lord. And, on Coruscant, Han Solo’s luck may be changing—unless . . . well, unless it isn’t . . . * Artist Carlos D’Anda returns! “Brian Wood and Carlos D'Anda truly have the making of a classic on their hands.” —Newsarama “I like to think of this comic as the pilot for the lost television series that was supposed to take place between Star Wars and Empire. Everything about it screams Star Wars.” —Comics Bulletin
title: Star Wars #11
